All right, so texting all of your old clients, canceled clients, people that didn't continue with the challenge, that's what we want to do after your email blast. So how do we do that? First things we need to do is identify who we're going to be texting and getting their numbers. So you should have a list of everyone that canceled, either on your CRM or your master spreadsheets or located somewhere. And you want to get all of their cell phone numbers. So you compile that list, I would recommend three months or before. Since the cancellation, you don't want to text somebody that maybe just canceled last month or the month before. And once you have all of those names and numbers, you want to start blasting them with a text message that also is accompanied by a video. And the video has to be less than 60 seconds for most cell phone carriers to deliver it. So there's going to be a script for the texting where you'll also put in your link because you want your ClickFunnels link because you want to send everybody to that opt-in page so they get you like your amazing copy and they get to see the video that's on there, which really fires them up so they fill out the form. So you want to use the script that's in this training portal. And you also want to film a video. And we have a sample of that as well in this training portal that is less than 60 seconds. Okay. So once you have the script and the video filmed, then you can start texting. And I would highly recommend you doing that on your personal phone. You don't want to send it through like front or skip you or any kind of automated message because it probably won't deliver the videos. So you want to do it one by one. I would definitely set aside some time to make sure that you can text everybody individually because this is going to have the highest percentage of returns. You may have more overall opt-ins from your emails because the list is so big, but the texting is going to really provide a higher percentage of people getting to that opt-in page and actually filling it out. So once you text them out, you'll see them starting to populate on your Google Sheets and then you know that they have filled it out. Everybody might not respond. They might just click on the link and opt-in. And once they've done that, mark them off on your spreadsheet and move on to the next person that you're texting. And I would shoot for texting at least two to 300 people. And it might take some time, but again, really high returns. So let's jump into exactly how you're going to be doing that. Cool. First thing is, let's see here. I have... This is not the portal you guys will be using, but it's the one I'm setting up. So you'll send out this script basically that just introduces yourself to them. And then as soon as you send this script out, send the video as well. Or you can send the video at the same time. It's up to you. We've done it both ways and it both worked. The video needs to be less than 60 seconds. So this... In your portal, there'll be a sample of the video of what that looks like. I believe I have it right here. I'll show you a quick little snippet. It has to be 60 seconds or less or it won't deliver. It'll just say the video's too long for almost all carriers. So I made mine 59 seconds and it worked. So essentially it's just a quick... What's up, Joey here? Anyways, I am making a quick video for you because we are running a 21-day deep... So it's very similar to the other ones that we already made, but just way faster, way more condensed so they can get it via text. Just do it on your... So it has the copy and it has this video here. So this is the link. Don't send them right to your form or they probably won't fill it out without any copy. So that's why we're sending them to this one. So we're going to copy this link here and we'll make it smaller using Bitly. So I'm going to type in Bitly. Just because it's a long text and the text is already going to be long. So just paste it in here. So I pasted it in here. It gave me a smaller one. So let's copy that and when you're texting it, I will just put this in here and I'll just type in your link here. So I need to know it's 24 hours or I have to give up your spot. And then so you send them that text along with that video. Okay. So blast that out to as many people as you can.
